context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent uses the tile's configuration validation and troubleshooting flow for token acquisition problems.

checklist.name: starts with validation tooling
checklist.description: Runs or references `python3 scripts/check_config.py` (or `python3 scripts/prom_query.py config`) before deeper debugging.

checklist.name: attributes failure to token acquisition
checklist.description: Correctly distinguishes token endpoint problems from Prometheus query problems based on `error_code`, HTTP status, and command context.

checklist.name: recommends a confirming command
checklist.description: Recommends a concrete command such as `python3 scripts/prom_query.py token --refresh` or `python3 scripts/check_config.py`.

checklist.name: avoids tool-maintainer framing
checklist.description: Keeps the response focused on operating the helper scripts instead of discussing script rewrites.
